content.en:
"Damn, you can't beat him at all!"

The Ghost Domain Ancestor said helplessly.

It was also the first time he had encountered such a difficult opponent as Ye Tian, if he was replaced by other Supreme Domain Ancestors, even if he was equal to Ye Tian's strength, he would be besieged to death by them, or consumed to death.

But Ye Tian was able to escape into the depths of the void, he could easily recover all his strength, and he had the Immortal Holy Skill, and the speed of recovering from his injuries was too fast, even their hole cards could not instantly hit Ye Tian.

Therefore, they couldn't help Ye Tian.

If this continues, Ye Tian will not die, but they will be seriously injured and fall one by one.

"What should I do?"

The Ancestor of the Xuan Ghost Domain asked.

Yuanfeng Yuzu was also more helpless, and in this case, he couldn't do anything.

Unless they possessed the kind of top-notch holy object that could kill the invincible domain ancestor level with one blow, they would have any hope of killing Ye Tian with one blow.

But they don't have such top-notch relics!

"Send a message to the Bird War Domain Ancestor, he asked us to make a move, we can't kill the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, if he doesn't care, once we are targeted by the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, there will be no way to resist him, unless we stay in the branch forever and don't come out!"

Yuanfeng Yuzu said.

"That's the only way to do it!"

The ancestors of the Xuan Ghost Domain answered them one by one.

Distance.

The Bird Battle Domain Ancestor received a summons from the Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor and the Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestor.

"A few pieces of waste!"

The Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor secretly cursed.

However, he had already expected all this, but he was just a little unwilling.

Now, Yuanfeng Yuzu and others have summoned for help, and they are obviously really out of line.

If you continue to let Yuanfeng Yuzu and the others fight with Ye Tian, I am afraid that a few more four-star kings will fall.

The four-star king is not a cabbage, but the foundation of the future of the Ghost Fox Organization!

Although the final decision was made by the leader, there were more four-star kings who fell, and he would also suffer severe punishments.

Therefore, the four-star king cannot continue to fall.

"Qingyang Domain Ancestor, it's time for you to make a move, once you successfully kill the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, all the benefits you ask for will be given to you. Remember, you must use all your strength to kill the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, and don't hide anything. I know you've been hiding your strength, and I don't know to what extent, but I hope you don't be careless, understand?"

The Sparrow War Domain Ancestor reminded.

"Lord Bird Battle Domain Ancestor, don't worry, it's just a Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, it's not difficult for me to kill him!"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor said with a smile.

However, what the Qingyang Domain Ancestor didn't know was that Ye Tian's Eternal Immortal Holy Body had reached the most critical moment.

If the shackles of the Eternal Immortal Eucharistic Consummation and the Extreme Realm were compared to a barrier, then now this barrier is full of cracks, and it can all be shattered at any time.

Even if Ye Tian was willing, he could now forcibly impact the extreme realm of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body.

However, Ye Tian did not do this.

He thought to himself that the Ghost Fox Organization might still have hole cards or hidden four-star kings who didn't make a move, and he was ready to wait for that person to make a move, and then break the limit realm of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body.

As the first holy body of the Dark Sanctuary, the Eternal Immortal Holy Body is extremely powerful, and once it reaches the extreme realm, its power will skyrocket many times.

At that time, the Eternal Immortal Eucharist was the true Eternal Immortal Eucharist.

Abrupt.

Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor and Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestor retreated one after another, and a figure in the distance shuttled at great speed, and in a blink of an eye, they came to Ye Tian's face, stopping Ye Tian and preventing Ye Tian from pursuing the other four-star kings.

Ye Tian did not continue to pursue, but stared at the Qingyang Domain Ancestor.

Judging from the exploration of the copying talent, Ye Tian knew the name and general origin of the Qingyang Domain Ancestor.

"The four-star king of the Ghost Fox Organization seems to be a hidden four-star king!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Qingyang Domain Ancestor is not a saint endowment, but his strength is not simple, and he makes Ye Tian feel pressure.

Obviously, the Qingyang Domain Ancestor is very powerful!

"Qingyang Domain Ancestor, it's him, hasn't he broken through to the Invincible Domain Ancestor realm yet?"

The Ghost Domain Ancestor and other four-star kings recognized the identity of the Qingyang Domain Ancestor.

The outside world didn't know about the Qingyang Domain Ancestor, but they knew that the Ghost Fox Organization had such a four-star king, and it was an incomparably ancient four-star king, and when they joined the Ghost Fox Organization, the Qingyang Domain Ancestor was already a four-star king.

Moreover, Qingyang Domain Ancestor has not had any news for a long time, and they even thought that Qingyang Domain Ancestor had already impacted the Invincible Domain Ancestor realm, but they didn't expect that they were still in the strongest Domain Ancestor realm now.

"Qingyang Domain Ancestor, let's besiege the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor together!"

The Mysterious Ghost Domain Ancestor proposed.

"A bunch of rubbish, get out of the way, don't get in my way!"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor said very politely.

"You ......"

The Mysterious Ghost Domain Ancestor and others were extremely annoyed.

Everyone is a four-star king, and the Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestor actually called them waste, it's just too hateful!

Just when the Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestor and the others were about to refute, the voice of the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor came: "All retreat, let the Qingyang Domain Ancestor deal with the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor alone!"

"Yes!"

The Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestor and the others retreated honestly, they didn't dare to resist the order of the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor, otherwise they would be looking for death.

In fact, it was the best way for them to assist the Qingyang Domain Ancestor to deal with Ye Tian, but the Qingyang Domain Ancestor was too arrogant, and he thought that those four-star kings were waste, and maybe they would interfere with his attack during the battle.

That's why he decided to fight the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors alone.

"Ghost Fox Organization, Qingyang Domain Ancestor, please advise!"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor self-declared his identity.

"Battle Gate, Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, please give me advice!"

Ye Tian also said simply.

As soon as the words fell, the battle began.

The Qingyang Domain Ancestor held the Qingyang Sword in his hand and killed Ye Tian.

The Qingyang Sword is not a holy artifact, but it integrates a holy artifact into the weapon and creates this weapon that can enhance combat effectiveness, this weapon is called a holy soldier!

In fact, the holy soldiers could not exert the full power of the holy relics, but some holy relics were really not suitable for combat, such as the Qingyang Domain Ancestor was good at sword skills, if there were no sword holy relics, he could only choose this way.

This is also a weapon commonly used by the ancestors of the invincible domain, and the effect is not bad if it is transformed into a holy soldier with holy relics.

"Holy Skill: Sword Star!"

The ancestor of the Qingyang Domain stabbed with a sword.

With a tear, the void pierced through, as if ignoring time and space, and directly hit Ye Tian's body.

Puff!!

Ye Tian's Golden Body Saint Technique and Saint Armor Saint Technique could not block this sword, all of them were broken, and even the somewhat damaged Jin Chen Armor was pierced, leaving a sword hole in his body.

This time, Ye Tian was injured, and the injury was not light.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's timely use of the Immortal Saint Technique to quickly heal his injuries, he was afraid that he would be seriously injured.

"It's so strong!"

Ye Tian said solemnly.

Compared to the Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestors, the strength of the Qingyang Domain Ancestors had completely risen to another level.

Moreover, he couldn't perceive the strength or weakness of the Soul Holy Light of the Qingyang Domain Ancestor, as if he had returned to his roots, and the Soul Holy Light was completely integrated with his own strength, so that he could be silent.

"Could it be that he has condensed the Holy Soul!!"

Ye Tian guessed!
